description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring eight evenly spaced cylindrical glass shades arranged in a circular pattern around a central hub. Each shade is supported by a gracefully curved arm extending from the central body, which is adorned with decorative scrollwork and intricate detailing. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling mount via a robust chain and a decorative canopy. The glass shades appear frosted or etched, diffusing the light and adding a touch of elegance. The main structure is likely made of polished metal, possibly chrome or nickel, contributing to its reflective and luxurious appearance. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with a classic yet slightly modernized aesthetic.
description: An elegant chandelier-style sconce with eight frosted glass shades on curved metal arms, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount. Features ornate scrollwork and a polished metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight glass shades and the symmetrical arrangement of the curved arms radiating from the central hub.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the full circular arrangement of shades and the decorative central body.
description_view_2: Another rotated perspective, highlighting the even spacing of the arms and the detailed scrollwork on the central fixture.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to the others, emphasizing the uniformity and balance of the chandelier's design.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a classic chandelier design with ornate scrollwork and a polished metallic finish, blending traditional elegance with subtle modern influences. The frosted glass shades and symmetrical arm arrangement evoke a timeless, luxurious aesthetic.
